text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu: We continue to strike Hezbollah with precision and determination. In Beirut, we killed Ali Yusuf Harshi, personal secretary and close aide to Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem. Overnight, the IDF hit terror infrastructure across southern Lebanon: crossings used to move thousands of weapons, rockets, and launchers, plus arms depots, launchers, and Hezbollah command centers. Our message is clear: anyone targeting Israeli civilians will be struck. We will keep hitting Hezbollah wherever necessary until full security is restored for northern residents. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 内塔尼亚胡：我们正以精准和决心持续打击真主党。在贝鲁特，我们击毙了真主党领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆的个人秘书兼亲密助手阿里·优素福·哈尔希。昨夜，以色列国防军袭击了整个南黎巴嫩的恐怖基础设施：用于运输数千件武器、火箭弹及发射装置的过境点，以及武器库、发射装置和真主党指挥中心。我们的信息很明确：任何以以色列平民为目标者都将遭到打击。我们将继续在必要时打击真主党，直至北部居民完全恢复安全。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian President's Deputy: 'Pakistani officials have confirmed that all our allies during the unjust war are included in the ceasefire' (This means Pakistan is pushing for Hezbollah to be part of the agreement) BREAKING 🔴 Iran says it will only join Islamabad talks if Israel halts strikes in Lebanon. text: Open Source Intel Iran's Ambassador to Russia: “Iran has not closed the Strait of Hormuz even for a single day, and in recent days it has not blocked it but has decided to stabilize its legal structure.” Despite the 2 week ceasefire with Iran, which was supposed to include the full reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, Polymarket users give just a 26% chance that traffic returns to normal by the end of April. Ceasefire still seems very shaky. We will see. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042179156113289652/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet

text: ELINT News RT @ArmchairAdml : #USNAVY United States Navy - 🚨 7700 General Emergency Northrop Grumman MQ-4C Triton 1x #AE7815 169804 - Unknown C/S A US Navy MQ-4 drone operating over the Persian Gulf and Strait of Hormuz has declared an emergency en route back to Sigonella Naval Station. At 0956z it made a right-hand turn off it's track back to Sigonella and back out into the Persian Gulf. Two minutes latrer at 0958z it began a descent from 50,000ft down to 9,500ft by 1011z, at which point @flightradar24 lost it's signal. @MATA_osint tweet
text_zh: ELINT News RT @ArmchairAdml : #USNAVY 美国海军 - 🚨 7700通用紧急情况 诺斯罗普·格鲁曼MQ-4C特里顿 1x #AE7815 169804 - 未知呼号 一架美国海军MQ-4无人机在波斯湾和霍尔木兹海峡上空执行任务，在返回西戈内拉海军航空站的途中宣布紧急情况。在0956z时，它向右转偏离返回西戈内拉的航线，重新进入波斯湾。两分钟后，在0958z时，它开始从50,000英尺下降，到1011z时降至9,500英尺，此时@flightradar24失去了它的信号。@MATA_osint 推文

text: 🇺🇸 A U.S. Navy MQ-4C Triton intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance drone squawked emergency code 7700, then began losing altitude and most likely crashed into the Persian Gulf, according to FlightRadar tracking data. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 根据FlightRadar追踪数据，一架美国海军MQ-4C Triton情报、监视与侦察无人机发出7700紧急代码，随后开始下降高度，极有可能坠入波斯湾。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷💬🇺🇸🇵🇰An Iranian delegation will arrive in Islamabad this evening for talks with the US, Iranian Ambassador to Pakistan Reza Amiri Moghadam reported. 🔴@DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇮🇷 The Iranian ambassador to Pakistan has deleted a tweet announcing that an Iranian delegation would arrive in Islamabad. An official at the Iranian embassy told AFP the message was removed due to a “timing” issue, stating, “we were not supposed to publish it,” without confirming whether the delegation is still expected. Meanwhile, Iran says it will only participate in upcoming peace talks in Islamabad if Israel halts its attacks on Lebanon. The deputy foreign minister added that any regional peace must include Lebanon, noting that Iran refrained from retaliating overnight after the United States urged Israel to stop the strikes, according to an ITV interview. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复DD Geopolitics："🇮🇷💬🇺🇸🇵🇰伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使礼萨·阿米里·穆加达姆报告，伊朗代表团将于今晚抵达伊斯兰堡与美国进行会谈。🔴@DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐款 | 广告" 🇮🇷 伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使已删除宣布伊朗代表团将抵达伊斯兰堡的推文。伊朗使馆官员告诉法新社，该信息因“时机”问题被移除，称“我们本不应发布”，未确认代表团是否仍将如期抵达。同时，伊朗表示只有以色列停止对黎巴嫩的袭击，才会参加即将在伊斯兰堡举行的和平谈判。副外长补充道，任何地区和平都必须包括黎巴嫩，并指出在美国敦促以色列停止打击后，伊朗连夜克制了报复行动，据ITV采访报道。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇾🇪 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Houthi official Mohamed A-Bukhai warned that any act of folly by the Israeli "enemy" through new aggression against the Lebanese people will be met with an unprecedented response from Yemen. “We will not remain silent nor abandon our brothers in Hezbollah, whatever the challenges and risks.” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸🇮🇱 Al-Arabi Al-Jadeed: Informed Iranian sources said that the Pakistani mediator and other parties are making diplomatic efforts to salvage the ceasefire. Any peace in the region must include Lebanon, and the coming hours will be decisive in determining whether Israel can be restrained. text: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 CONFIRMED! The White House reviewed and approved a social media post by Pakistan’s prime minister, Shehbaz Sharif, which explicitly stated that Lebanon was part of the ceasefire agreement. However, after Israel bombed Lebanon, the Trump administration backtracked, claiming that Lebanon had not been included in the deal. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 确认！白宫审核并批准了巴基斯坦总理谢赫巴兹·谢里夫的社交媒体帖子，其中明确表示黎巴嫩是停火协议的一部分。然而，在以色列轰炸黎巴嫩后，特朗普政府改口，声称黎巴嫩并未包含在协议中。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israeli security services have arrested a 22‑year‑old Haifa resident, Ami Gaidrov, on suspicion of espionage for Iran and attempting to assassinate former Israeli Prime Minister Naftali Bennett by producing explosives. Gaidrov allegdly was in contact with an Iranian handler from August 2025, carried out multiple tasks for large sums of money, and manufactured explosives intended for the attack. He rented an apartment in Haifa, documented the process and sent footage to his handler. He also took photos of Haifa port and missile impact sites in the north, and was asked to find a rental property overlooking the port to install a permanent camera. He received over 70,000 shekels, mostly via digital wallets. Several other Israeli citizens have been arrested for assisting him. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 以色列安全部门逮捕了一名22岁的海法居民阿米·盖德罗夫，其涉嫌为伊朗从事间谍活动并试图通过制造炸药暗杀以色列前总理纳夫塔利·贝内特。据称盖德罗夫自2025年8月起与一名伊朗操纵者联系，多次收取高额报酬执行任务，并制造了用于袭击的炸药。他在海法租下一间公寓，记录过程并将录像发送给操纵者。他还拍摄了海法港及北部导弹袭击地点，并被要求寻找可俯瞰港口的出租物业以安装永久摄像头。他通过数字钱包收取了超过7万谢克尔，另有数名以色列公民因协助他而被捕。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇾 US Senior Advisor for African and Middle Eastern Affairs Massad Boulos said he held a call with General Saddam Khalifa Haftar, discussing Libya’s progress toward a unified national budget and its role in hosting part of AFRICOM’s Flintlock 26 exercise. They also addressed issues related to security coordination, regional stability, and longer-term prospects for cooperation and development. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇾 美国非洲及中东事务高级顾问马萨德·布洛斯表示，他与萨达姆·哈利法·哈夫塔尔将军通电话，讨论了利比亚在统一国家预算方面的进展及其在承办非洲司令部‘燧发枪26’部分演习中的作用。双方还就安全协调、地区稳定以及长期合作发展前景等问题交换了意见。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 IDF Spokesperson shares details of the eliminated targets during yesterday’s airstrikes in Lebanon: The IDF attacked and eliminated yesterday Ali Yosef Harshi, the personal secretary of the Secretary-General of the terrorist organization Hezbollah…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu said Israel continues to strike Hezbollah with force, precision and determination. In Beiru, he stated that the IDF killed Ali Youssef Harashi, the personal secretary of Hezbollah Secretary‑General Naim Qassem and one of his closest associates. “Our message is clear: whoever acts against Israeli citizens will be hit. We will continue to strike Hezbollah wherever necessary until we restore full security to the northern residents.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness："⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 以色列国防军发言人公布了昨日在黎巴嫩空袭中清除目标的具体信息：以军昨日袭击并清除了恐怖组织真主党总书记的个人秘书阿里·优素福·哈尔希…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列将继续以强力、精准和决心打击真主党。在贝鲁特，他称以军击毙了真主党总书记纳伊姆·卡西姆的个人秘书、其最亲密助手之一的阿里·优素福·哈拉希。‘我们的信息很明确：任何伤害以色列公民的人都将遭到打击。我们将继续在必要地点打击真主党，直至为北部居民恢复完全安全。’@wfwitness

text: 🇬🇧 🇦🇪 ⚡️ Starmer Touches Down in Abu Dhabi for Urgent Hormuz Reopening Talks
text_zh: 🇬🇧 🇦🇪 ⚡️ 斯塔默抵达阿布扎比进行紧急霍尔木兹海峡重启谈判

text: 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 Putin "has not made any decisions about an Easter truce as of today," Peskov stated. Zelensky previously proposed declaring a truce for Easter. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 普京“截至目前尚未就复活节停火做出任何决定”，佩斯科夫声明。泽连斯基此前曾提议宣布复活节期间休战。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷💬🇺🇸🇵🇰An Iranian delegation will arrive in Islamabad this evening for talks with the US, Iranian Ambassador to Pakistan Reza Amiri Moghadam reported. 🔴@DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The authorities in Islamabad have blocked the city's main roads ahead of the arrival of US and Iranian delegations, reports a TASS correspondent. All entrances to the Serena Hotel, where the delegations are scheduled to be accommodated, are closed. This area is under special control by security forces. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷💬🇺🇸🇵🇰伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使礼萨·阿米里·穆加达姆报告，一个伊朗代表团将于今晚抵达伊斯兰堡与美国进行会谈。🔴@DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐款 | 广告” 🇵🇸 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 塔斯社记者报道，伊斯兰堡当局在美国和伊朗代表团抵达前已封锁城市主要道路。代表团计划下榻的塞雷纳酒店所有入口均已关闭。该区域处于安全部队特别管控之下。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "sirens in the upper Gallie" Impact in open areas
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“上加利利地区警报声”开放区域遭受袭击

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 12: Commander of Iran’s Quds Force Ismail Qaani, successor to Qasem Soleimani, has been absent from public view since the 17th of February. Israeli speculation that he may be a “Mossad agent” is dismissed; instead, Israeli security sources suggest Israel may not see him as a priority target because he has been far less effective than Soleimani. Under Qaani, Iran’s proxy axis has collapsed: Hezbollah lost its leadership and firepower, the Assad government fell, and pro‑Iranian militias in Iraq have lost influence. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 以色列第12频道：伊朗圣城旅指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼（卡西姆·苏莱曼尼继任者）自2月17日起未公开露面。以色列猜测其可能是“摩萨德特工”的说法被驳回；相反，以色列安全消息人士暗示以色列可能未将其视为优先目标，因其成效远逊于苏莱曼尼。卡尼任期内，伊朗的代理轴心已崩溃：真主党丧失领导力与火力，阿萨德政府倒台，伊拉克亲伊朗民兵影响力衰退。@wfwitness

text: sirens in the upper Gallie
text_zh: 上加利利地区警报声

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iran’s police commander Ahmad-Reza Radan said that after 40 days of "aggression," US‑Israeli enemies were "forced" to accept Iran’s declared conditions. The "resistance of the armed forces," the presence of the Iranian people on the scene, and the "guidance of the Supreme Leader" led the "aggressors" to retreat in the face of the nation’s will. While calm has returned, police forces remain on high alert. Any further hostile act will be met with a decisive, swift and instructive response. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗警察指挥官艾哈迈德-礼萨·拉丹表示，经过40天的“侵略”，美国-以色列敌人“被迫”接受伊朗提出的条件。“武装部队的抵抗”、伊朗人民在现场的存在以及“最高领袖的指引”使“侵略者”在民族意志面前撤退。虽局势恢复平静，警察部队仍保持高度警戒。任何进一步敌对行为都将遭到果断、迅速且具有警示性的回应。@wfwitness

text: Israeli Politicians Grill Netanyahu for "Disasterous" Ceasefire Netanyahu is facing a strong backlash at home over the ceasefire "Israel was shut out of", as delierate Israeli strikes on Lebanon risk provoking Iran into response, potentially collapsing the ceasefire. U.S. commentators accuse Israel of trying to sabotage Trumps peace deal. READ MORE
text_zh: 以色列政客因“灾难性”停火协议痛斥内塔尼亚胡，内塔尼亚胡因“以色列被排除在外”的停火协议在国内面临强烈反弹，同时以色列对黎巴嫩的有意袭击可能引发伊朗回应，进而导致停火协议崩溃。美国评论员指责以色列试图破坏特朗普的和平协议。阅读更多

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇸🇾 Al Jadeed reports that intensive contacts led by the Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam, in coordination with the Syrian presidency and with Arab, regional, and international mediators, have resulted in Israel backing down from targeting the Masnaa…" ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Al-Arabiya : The Jdeidet Yabous border crossing with Lebanon (known as the Masnaa crossing) has reopened after the threat that prompted its temporary closure “has passed”. The crossing had been shut following Israeli threats to strike it over alleged Hezbollah use, which both Beirut and Damascus denied. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇸🇾 据Al Jadeed报道，由黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆主导的密集接触，在叙利亚总统府协调及阿拉伯、地区和国际调解方的参与下，促使以色列放弃针对马士纳的目标…” ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 阿拉伯电视台：与黎巴嫩接壤的杰代德·亚布斯边境口岸（即马士纳口岸）在促使临时关闭的威胁“已过”后重新开放。该口岸此前因以色列威胁打击据称真主党使用的通道而关闭，贝鲁特和大马士革均否认此说法。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah, in its sixth communiqué of the day, said it targeted Kiryat Shmona for the third time today at 11:30am with a rocket barrage, in response to the "enemy’s violation of the ceasefire." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党在其当日第六份公报中称，为回应“敌人违反停火协议”，于今日上午11:30第三次以火箭弹齐射袭击了基利亚特谢莫纳。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli drone strike targeted the town of Al‑Mansouri in the Tyre district of southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 一架以色列无人机袭击了黎巴嫩南部提尔地区的曼苏里镇。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Al-Arabi Al-Jadeed: Informed Iranian sources said that the Pakistani mediator and other parties are making diplomatic efforts to salvage the ceasefire. Tehran is awaiting an end to attacks on Lebanon and a U.S. commitment to all understandings before starting negotiations. Messages continue to be exchanged between Iran and the U.S. via Pakistan. Tehran has received promises of U.S. action to end the attacks but insists on actual compliance. The coming hours are sensitive and will determine whether Israel commits to a ceasefire in Lebanon. Iran is determined to respond to ceasefire violations, but the Pakistani mediator has asked for time for his efforts. U.S. statements in recent hours have deepened mistrust and increased Iranian doubts about the viability of negotiations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 阿拉伯新报：知情伊朗消息人士称，巴基斯坦调解方及其他各方正进行外交努力以挽救停火协议。德黑兰在等待对黎巴嫩袭击的结束及美国对所有谅解的承诺，之后才会启动谈判。伊朗与美国通过巴基斯坦持续交换信息。德黑兰已收到美国将采取行动结束袭击的承诺，但坚持要求实际履行。未来数小时局势敏感，将决定以色列是否承诺在黎巴嫩停火。伊朗决心对违反停火行为作出回应，但巴基斯坦调解方已请求给予其斡旋时间。美国近期的声明加深了不信任，加剧了伊朗对谈判可行性的怀疑。@wfwitness

text: Netanyahu: Israel will strike Hezbollah wherever necessary.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：以色列将在任何必要之处打击真主党。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The Lebanese Army announced that four Lebanese soldiers were killed as a result of Israeli strikes yesterday in Sidon, Shmistar and Hermel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩军队宣布，四名黎巴嫩士兵因以色列昨日在赛达、什米斯塔尔和赫尔梅勒的袭击而丧生。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 French foreign minister Jean-Noël Barrot strongly condemned Israeli strikes on Lebanon and said that destroying the Lebanese state will not destroy Hezbollah – on the contrary, it will strengthen the group. He added that Lebanon should not be a scapegoat for a government upset that a ceasefire was reached between Washington and Tehran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 法国外交部长让-诺埃尔·巴罗强烈谴责以色列对黎巴嫩的袭击，并表示摧毁黎巴嫩国家不会摧毁真主党——相反，这将加强该组织的力量。他补充说，黎巴嫩不应成为华盛顿和德黑兰达成停火协议后，一个政府不满的替罪羊。@wfwitness
